title: Quotes randomisation on refresh, remove 6th memory photo, and audio updates for Home & Our Memories

requirements.text: On the Quotes & Fun Facts page (QuotesPage.tsx), ensure that every full page refresh loads a freshly randomised quote and fun fact automatically — without requiring the user to click the refresh button. The random selection must differ from the previous value on each reload.

quotes: everytime when I refresh that means it wants to give new things in section called 'Quotes & Fun Facts'

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to or refreshing the Quotes & Fun Facts page shows a randomly selected quote each time.
Navigating to or refreshing the Quotes & Fun Facts page shows a randomly selected fun fact each time.
The random pick is seeded by the current timestamp or Math.random() so it differs across refreshes.

requirements.text: In OurMemoriesPage.tsx, remove the 6th image (index 5, zero-based) from the curated photo array so that gallery only shows the remaining photos.
acceptanceCriteria: The Our Memories gallery renders one fewer photo than before.
The photo that was previously in the 6th position is no longer visible.
All remaining photos display and open in the lightbox correctly.

requirements.text: Add continuous background BGM using the file 'Doremon_theme' (served from frontend/public/assets/audio/Doremon_theme) that starts playing automatically when the user is on the Home / Dashboard page and stops (or pauses) when they navigate away from it. The music should loop and play at a comfortable default volume.

quotes: Background bgm when in Home page the sound should play all the time . this one 'Doremon_theme'

acceptanceCriteria: Opening or navigating to the Dashboard/Home page automatically starts playing Doremon_theme in a loop.
The BGM pauses or stops when navigating away from the Home page.
The audio file path resolves to /assets/audio/Doremon_theme (with its original extension).
Music does not double-play if the user returns to the Home page while it is already running.

requirements.text: On the Home / Dashboard page, attach a click handler to the central Doraemon image so that clicking it plays the audio file 'VID_20260301_052016.MP4' (served from frontend/public/assets/audio/VID_20260301_052016.MP4). The sound should play from the start on each click.

quotes: when I hit or click the Doremon image at the centre that in the home page this sound wants to come 'VID_20260301_052016.MP4'

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the central Doraemon image on the Dashboard page plays VID_20260301_052016.MP4.
Each click restarts the audio from the beginning.
The audio file path resolves correctly from the public assets directory.

requirements.text: Play the audio file 'VID_20260301_052623.MP4' (served from frontend/public/assets/audio/VID_20260301_052623.MP4) automatically when the user navigates to the Our Memories page (OurMemoriesPage.tsx). The sound should play once on page entry and stop when the user leaves the page.

quotes: when I went to 'Our Memories' this sound wants to come 'VID_20260301_052623.MP4'

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to the Our Memories page automatically plays VID_20260301_052623.MP4.
The sound plays once (non-looping) on page entry.
The audio stops and is cleaned up when the user navigates away from Our Memories.
The audio file path resolves correctly from the public assets directory.

constraints: Audio files Doremon_theme, VID_20260301_052016.MP4, and VID_20260301_052623.MP4 must be referenced by their exact provided filenames under frontend/public/assets/audio/.
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Do not alter the backend schema or Motoko actor.
nonGoals: Re-implementing or restyling the Quotes & Fun Facts page beyond randomisation behaviour.
Adding upload functionality for new memory photos.
Changing any other audio files or sound hooks already in place (Dreamy.mp3, Hello.mp3, Double Knock.mp3).
Modifying authentication or lock screen logic.
